The tape is chopping sideways with 53% breadth. Stock-picking matters more than market direction here. FMCG is lagging the broader tape (score 19) — an extra headwind. ₹1,366 is the line in the sand. Verdict: HOLD. Own it? Let it work. Don't own it? Cleaner entries exist elsewhere. Outlook: Mildly Bearish → Mildly Bearish → Mildly Bearish.
